title: gentianella pilosa subsp. degenii
intro: Gentianella pilosa subsp. degenii, also known as Degen's gentianella, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family (Gentianaceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Gentianella pilosa subsp. degenii include its potential to help regulate blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
